steps.t: Ahûd suggests collecting bog-lurker meat to lure the giant crocodile Imkhâlam to you. Find a good location in the sewers under the Sail-haven of Umbar…
Ahûd suggests collecting bog-lurker meat to lure the giant crocodile Imkhâlam to you. Place the bait to lure Imkhâlam to you. Imkhâlam is in the sewer…
You have summoned and defeated Imkhâlam the giant crocodile. Return to Ahûd at Kruha-sûrja, the guard post in the northern part of the sewers beneath …
